# Your Bankruptcy Fresh Start
> Bankruptcy gives you a legal fresh start. Learn how discharge works, what debts are erased, and how to rebuild your financial life. Free 202...

## About
bankruptcyfreshstart.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Buy a House After Bankruptcy -- How Long to Wait -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/buy-a-house.html
- Getting a Car Loan After Bankruptcy -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/car-loan.html
- Bankruptcy Myths -- What People Get Wrong -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/common-myths.html
- COVID and Bankruptcy -- Pandemic Debt Relief Options -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/covid-bankruptcy.html
- Rebuilding Credit After Bankruptcy -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/credit-rebuilding.html
- Bankruptcy and Employment -- Section 525 Protections -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/employment.html
- First Year After Bankruptcy Discharge -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/first-year.html
- Bankruptcy for Gig Workers -- Uber, DoorDash, Freelancer Guide -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/gig-worker-bankruptcy.html
- Your Bankruptcy Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/
- Inheritance During Bankruptcy -- What Happens to Your Inheritance -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/inheritance-during-bankruptcy.html
- Filing Bankruptcy Without Your Spouse -- Individual vs Joint Filing -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/married-filing-bankruptcy-alone.html
- Rebuilding Credit After Bankruptcy -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/rebuilding-credit.html
- Bankruptcy for Seniors -- Guide for Retirees and Fixed Income -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/senior-citizen-bankruptcy.html
- Bankruptcy and Unemployment -- Filing While Jobless -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/unemployment-and-bankruptcy.html
- Your Rights After Bankruptcy Discharge -- Fresh Start: https://bankruptcyfreshstart.org/your-rights.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
